summary: Admin management system for Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang with full stable storage persistence for all admin panel modules and authentication/authorization fixes
architectural_notes: Admin authentication system with role-based access control
Only super_admin can create additional admin users
One Principal can only create one admin account (prevent duplicates)
Uses msg.caller as admin Principal ID instead of hardcoded values
Stable storage for admin persistence across canister upgrades
Token must be stored in localStorage (not memory) and attached via global interceptor to all protected POST/PUT/DELETE requests
All admin panel modules use stable storage with full CRUD; data must survive redeploy and canister restart
known_issues: Admin users may not persist after reload - storage mechanism needs verification
Authorization token not attached to CRUD requests causing 401 Unauthorized on POST/PUT/DELETE

existing_features.title: Store the authentication token in localStorage (persistent storage) after successful login, so that it survives page refreshes and is not lost when held only in memory.

Create a global HTTP request interceptor (or a shared API client utility) that automatically reads the token from localStorage and attaches the 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header to every POST, PUT, and DELETE request made to protected backend routes.
Ensure that on logout or token expiry, the token is removed from localStorage so that subsequent requests do not send a stale or invalid token.

new_feature_requests.summary: Refactor createAdminUser function: use msg.caller as admin id, first admin becomes super_admin automatically, prevent duplicate principal registration, remove hardcoded Principal.fromText
Remove all usage of Principal.fromText("aaaaa-aa") from the createAdminUser function in backend/main.mo
Use msg.caller as the admin user ID when creating new admin users in the createAdminUser function
Implement first-admin logic: when adminIdCounter equals 0, automatically assign the #super_admin role and bypass all authorization checks
After the first admin is created, enforce that only users with #super_admin role can create new admin users
Prevent duplicate admin registration by checking if msg.caller principal already exists in adminUsers storage before creating a new admin
Display the complete final implementation of the refactored createAdminUser function after all changes are applied

Implement full stable persistent storage for all admin panel modules (Mobil Keluarga, Mobil Niaga, Promo, Testimoni, Blog, Media Manager, Leads/Kontak Masuk, Simulasi Kredit, Statistik Pengunjung, Pengaturan Website, Admin Users) with full CRUD, logging, and auth validation

Fix authorization header not attached on CRUD requests: store token in localStorage, create global request interceptor to attach Authorization: Bearer <token> to all POST/PUT/DELETE requests, read token from storage on every request
